title: bulbinella latifolia subsp. toximontana
intro: Bulbinella latifolia subsp. toximontana, also known as the Toximontana Bulbinella, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Asphodelaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including wounds, fever, and respiratory problems, and has been found to have antioxidant and immunomodulatory activities. In traditional herbal medicine, it is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and has been used to make topical preparations such as salves and ointments to aid in wound healing.
